title: Allocation of jurisdiction for issuance of OCI card in respect of Gujarat State to FRRO Ahmedabad
description: Allocation of jurisdiction for issuance of OCI card in respect of Gujarat State to FRRO Ahmedabad
file_title: Allocation of jurisdiction for issuance of OCI card in respect of Gujarat State to FRRO Ahmedabad.pdf
text: Government of India/ifRW?ifcb'R Ministry of Home A f f a i r s / 7 ^ Wlcfif (Fore«g ners Division)/(j%%3ft Rqq<# iCp-fFf) M a j o r Dhyan Chand N a t i o n a l S t a d i u m , India Gate C i r c l e , N e w Oelhi-110002. Dated, the 13 August 2018. To (1) Shri Rajiv Ranjan Verma Joint Director Bureau of Immigration East Bloack-VIII, Sector-1, R.K. Puram, New Delhi-110066 (2) FRROs-Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, Kolkata, Amritsar, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Calicut, Goa, Lucknow and Ahmedabad Subject: Allocation of jurisdiction for issuance of OCI card in respect of Gujarat State to FRRO Ahmedabad I am directed to refer to this Ministry's Circular of even number dated 04.02.2013 (copy enclosed) through which FRROs were allocated different states/UTs for exercising jurisdictional control for acceptance and processing of OCI applications and to say that in / partial modification of above circular dated 04.02.2013, FRRO Ahmedabad is hereby •,..... allocated jurisdictional control for acceptance and processing of OCI applications for the state of Gujarat with immediate effect. End: As above Yours faithfully, MzJCZ (R.P. Sati) Under Secretary to the Govt, of India Tel: 23077515 Copy for information and necessary action to: 1. DDG,NIC, MHA, CGO Complex, New Delhi - with the request to updated the website related to OCI services at the earliest / r -- 1 of 1 --
